channel.title: Victoria H. Fan
channel.description: Recent content on Victoria H. Fan

item.title: Hello
item.description: Greetings! I am an MD-PhD student in the Higley Lab at Yale. My research interests lie at the intersection of visual neuroscience/neurophysiology and technology. I completed my undergraduate training at Stanford University, where I worked under the direction of EJ Chichilnisky and Charles Yu to develop technological treatments for blindness. I look forward to continuing along this thread of ophthalmic innovation research in the future!

item.title: Publications
item.description: Patents Fan VH, Fernald R. Infant Health Monitor Patch with Microphone. U.S. Patent 10,657,786, filed December 01, 2016 and issued May 19, 2020. [reprint] Fan VH, Fernald R. Heated Mist Earache and Infection Treatment Device. U.S. Patent 10,420,679, filed April 21, 2017 and issued September 24, 2019. [reprint] Peer-reviewed Publications Shim SY, Gong S, Fan VH, Rosenblatt MI, Al-Qahtani AF, Sun MG, Zhou Q, Kanu L, Vieira IV, Yu CQ (2020).

item.title: Presentations
item.description: Talks Fan VH. 'Restoring vision with an intraocular projector: A technological treatment for corneal blindness'. Spencer Center for Vision Research, Stanford School of Medicine, CA, June 2019. Fan VH. 'Restoring sight to the blind: Localizing current spread in the retina'. Achauer Undergraduate Honors Symposium in Biology, Stanford University, CA, May 2018. Conference Presentations Fan VH, Vieira IV, Sun MI, Rosenblatt MI, Yu CQ. 'Optical performance of electronic keratoprosthesis'.
